creator: colin-ports@heliocat.net
text:
Created attachment 181658
Port update

Diff contains the following changes:
Makefile: Version bump
distinfo: contents update
pkg-plist: .so version updates

Notable changes between 2.4.0.0 and 2.5.0.0:
    Services can now report permanent failure by having ./finish exit 125.
    s6-svwait, s6-svlisten and s6-svlisten1 now exit 99 when they time out. They exit n when there are n services reporting permanent failure. 

As always, update notes can be found at:
http://www.skarnet.org/software/s6/upgrade.html
